name: Slopshop
description: The protocol layer of intelligence. 1273 real APIs, multi-LLM orchestration (Claude+GPT+Grok+DeepSeek+Ollama), agent organizations, free persistent memory, Universal Model Mesh, Memory 2.0 GraphRAG, Marketplace, Safety Layer.
key_features: 1273 real API endpoints across 78 categories
Multi-LLM: Claude Opus, GPT-4.1, Grok-3, DeepSeek, Ollama local models
Agent organizations: launch 30-agent teams in one command
Free persistent memory (survives sessions, model swaps, restarts)
Memory 2.0: GraphRAG graph queries, auto-summarize namespaces, snapshot and pin
Universal Model Mesh: context, introspect, route, state
API Explorer with microsecond-precision timing
Workflows: multi-step conditional chains
Compare: side-by-side multi-LLM comparison
BYOK: bring your own API keys (0 credits for LLM calls)
Telemetry, eval scoring, billing/usage tracking
Native MCP server (slop mcp serve) — Claude Desktop, Cursor, Goose, OpenCode, Cline, Aider
Army Mode: 10,000 parallel agents with Merkle-verified results
Hive Workspaces: persistent multi-agent collaboration
Credit Exchange: agents earn credits by sharing idle compute
Browser/Desktop primitives: Swarm Visualizer SSE, MCP Desktop bootstrap
Safety layer: sandbox execution, circuit breakers, reputation slashing, chaos testing
Marketplace: template browsing, bounty board, Plugin Forge for custom tools
Agent templates: research swarm, content machine, security audit, data pipeline
Grok autonomous orchestration: optimize, critique, overlord endpoints
Official integrations: Goose Recipes, Aider commands, OpenCode plugin, Cline Skills, LangChain
Self-hostable, zero native dependencies
Interactive CLI with 44+ commands, shell completions, project scaffolding

integrations.goose: goose configure → Add Extension → STDIO → npx slopshop mcp serve
integrations.cline: MCP Marketplace → Add custom → npx slopshop mcp serve
